description_long: This house features a striking modern architectural design with a predominantly flat roof and a geometric, linear layout. The exterior is characterized by a monochrome palette of black, white, and gray, accented by lush landscaping with palm trees and shrubs. Large glass windows and sliding doors are integrated into the facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The property includes a driveway with a carport, multiple terraces, and stepped landscaping elements that create visual interest and functional outdoor areas. The house appears to be single-story, with a sprawling horizontal footprint and open-plan living spaces. The overall aesthetic is sleek, minimalist, and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and open sightlines.
description: A sleek, modern single-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and minimalist landscaping featuring palm trees and terraces. The exterior is defined by a bold black-and-white color scheme and geometric lines.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stepped landscaping, palm trees, and the house's elongated, linear structure with large windows and terraces.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the flat roof, open courtyard areas, and the arrangement of outdoor spaces and vegetation.
description_view_2: Opposite side view featuring the carport, driveway, and additional terraces, with clear visibility of the house's horizontal layout.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back landscaping, more palm trees, and the continuation of the geometric design with large windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a minimalist door, steps, and a covered carport with clean lines and no ornate detailing.
